title: 1st Place in Two Categories - Extrabotics Soccerbots Competition
summary: Won first place in two separate categories at the Extrabotics Soccerbots Competition. Demonstrated both technical robot design and competitive strategy execution.
details: First place in two categories at the Extrabotics Soccerbots Competition.
Competition involved designing, building, and programming autonomous soccer-playing robots.
Winning in two categories demonstrated breadth across both technical execution and strategic competition play.
